creator: hybridx87@gmail.com
text:
MD5 sum is ok

myBox# unset hint.pcm.0.dac
myBox# kldload snd_maestro3
myBox# sysctl hw.snd.maxautovchans=4
hw.snd.maxautovchans: 0 -> 4
myBox# sysctl hw.snd.pcm0.vchans=4
hw.snd.pcm0.vchans: 1 -> 4
myBox# pciconf -lv | grep ^pcm
pcm0@pci2:3:0:  class=0x040100 card=0x00e51028 chip=0x1998125d rev=0x10 hdr=0x00
myBox# cat /dev/sndstat
FreeBSD Audio Driver (newpcm)
Installed devices:
pcm0: <ESS Technology Maestro3> at io 0xec00 irq 5 kld snd_maestro3
(1p/1r/4v channels duplex default)

tty0 show;

pcm0: <ESS Technology Maestro3> port 0xec00-0xecff mem
0xf8ffe000-0xf8ffffff irq 5 at device 3.0 on pci2
pcm0: Maestro3 PCI subdev=0x00e51028 dac=1 adc=1
pcm0: <SigmaTel STAC9721/23 AC97 Codec>

Play perfect (2 copy XMMS), only gnome-settings-daemon still don't
start (i don't know why, but if i dont load snd_maestro3 module,
gnome-settings-daemon start and run nice). And..

---

..How I am talking on skype, I can't hear this person but he can hear me.
tty0;

pcm0:virtual:2:dsp0.4: play interrupt timeout, channel dead
pcm0:virtual:1:dsp0.3: play interrupt timeout, channel dead
pcm0:virtual:1:dsp0.3: play interrupt timeout, channel dead
pcm0:virtual:1:dsp0.3: play interrupt timeout, channel dead
pcm0:virtual:1:dsp0.3: play interrupt timeout, channel dead
